name: io.github.ecardwidget/ecardwidget-mcp
description: Official eCardWidget MCP server — send/search eCards, manage the directory, and run campaigns/widgets/automations with a scoped API key.

environmentVariables.name: ECW_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Scoped eCardWidget API key (Settings → Developers → API Keys). Used as a Bearer token.

environmentVariables.name: ECW_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default https://app.ecardwidget.com). For custom domains / testing.
